instruction: Click the Start Button to open the menu.
Select the Terminal from the Start menu item list.
Click the Close button on the Terminal window title bar.
Click the Close button to exit the Terminal application.
Click the Maximize button on the Terminal window.
Click on the Terminal icon in the taskbar.
Click the Close button on the Terminal title bar.
Double-click the 'This PC' icon to open file explorer.
Click the window title bar of 'This PC'.
Select the 'Work' folder within the 'This PC' window.
Double-click the 'Work' folder to open it.
Click on the text editor content of summary.txt.
Click the 'Install Now' button in the Python Setup.
Click the title bar of the 'This PC' window.
Click the 'This PC' window title bar.
Click the 'This PC' window title bar.
Click the Close button on the Terminal window.
Select 'Downloads' from the Start menu items.
Click the 'System Settings' window title bar.
Select 'File Explorer' from the Start menu items.
Select the 'This PC' icon from the desktop.
Click the 'This PC' window title bar.
Select the 'AppData' folder inside the window.
Click the Close button on the 'Temp' window.
Click the 'System Settings' window title bar.
Click the 'System Settings' title bar again.
Double-click 'Recycle Bin' to view deleted files.
Click the 'Recycle Bin' window title bar.
Click the Close button on the Recycle Bin window.
Click the Maximize button on the Documents window.
Click the Close button on the Downloads window.
Click the Close button of the Terminal window.
Click the title bar of the Python window.
Click the Close button on the Python window.
Click the File Explorer window title bar.
Click the Maximize button on File Explorer.
Click the text editor content in summary.txt.
Click the Close button on summary.txt.
Click the Terminal title bar again.
Click the System Settings window title bar.
Click the editor content area in log.txt.
Click the Close button on log.txt.
Click the Documents window title bar.
Click the Documents window title bar.
Click the Close button on the manager window.
